plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to Onpa are documented here. This file is generated automatically by [semantic-release](https://github.com/semantic-release/semantic-release) on each release.

plugins.prepareCmd: bash scripts/build_testflight_ipa.sh ${nextRelease.version} && mkdir -p build/TestFlight && printf '%s' "${nextRelease.notes}" | node scripts/format_testflight_notes.js > build/TestFlight/release-notes.md
